maestro:api-design.description: REST API design patterns for resource naming, status codes, pagination, error responses, and versioning. Use during maestro:design when specifying API contracts, and maestro:implement when building endpoints.

maestro_phases.design: Reference during API specification in design phase. Define resource structure, URL patterns, and response formats before implementation.
maestro_phases.implement: Apply REST conventions during endpoint implementation. Use status code reference and pagination patterns when coding API routes.

maestro:autonomous-loops.description: Patterns for autonomous Claude Code loops from simple pipelines to multi-agent DAG systems. Use during maestro:design when architecting automated workflows or multi-agent orchestration.

maestro_phases.design: Reference loop architecture patterns when designing autonomous workflows. Choose appropriate complexity level (sequential, parallel, DAG) during architecture decisions.

maestro:iterative-retrieval.description: Progressive context retrieval pattern for multi-agent workflows. Use during maestro:design when architecting subagent context strategies or RAG-like retrieval pipelines.

maestro_phases.design: Apply iterative retrieval when designing multi-agent context flow. Avoid upfront context loading -- design progressive refinement instead.

maestro:market-research.description: Market research, competitive analysis, and industry intelligence with source attribution. Use during maestro:design for research tasks, TAM/SAM/SOM estimates, or competitor analysis.

maestro_phases.design: Conduct market research during discovery phase. Produce decision-oriented summaries with source attribution for design specifications.

maestro:regex-vs-llm-structured-text.description: Decision framework for choosing regex vs LLM for structured text parsing. Use during maestro:design when planning text extraction approach, and maestro:implement when building parsers.

maestro_phases.design: Use decision framework to choose parsing approach during architecture. Start with regex for structured patterns, reserve LLM for edge cases.
maestro_phases.implement: Apply the chosen strategy during parser implementation. Build hybrid pipeline if needed.

maestro:search-first.description: Research-before-coding workflow. Use during maestro:design to find existing tools, libraries, and patterns before writing custom code.

maestro_phases.design: Search for existing solutions before designing custom implementations. Check package registries, GitHub, and documentation first.

maestro:strategic-compact.description: Strategic context compaction for long sessions. Use during maestro:design for multi-phase sessions approaching context limits, suggesting /compact at logical breakpoints.

maestro_phases.design: Suggest compaction between major phases (research to plan, plan to implement). Preserve critical decisions across compaction boundaries.

maestro:backend-patterns.description: Backend architecture patterns for Node.js, Express, and Next.js API routes. Use during maestro:implement when building server-side code, API routes, or backend services.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply backend patterns during Green phase (Step 6a.3) when writing server code. Use for API route structure, middleware patterns, and database query optimization.

maestro:clickhouse-io.description: ClickHouse query optimization, analytics patterns, and data engineering for high-performance analytical workloads. Use during maestro:implement when building analytics queries or data pipelines with ClickHouse.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply ClickHouse patterns when implementing analytics queries. Use materialized views and proper data types for performance.

maestro:content-hash-cache-pattern.description: SHA-256 content hash caching for expensive file processing. Use during maestro:implement when adding caching layers with path-independent, auto-invalidating cache keys.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply content hash caching during implementation when processing expensive file operations. Use SHA-256 hashes for cache keys instead of file paths.

maestro:cost-aware-llm-pipeline.description: Cost optimization for LLM API usage with model routing, budget tracking, retry logic, and prompt caching. Use during maestro:implement when building LLM-powered features.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply cost-aware patterns when implementing LLM API calls. Route by task complexity, track token budgets, and use prompt caching where possible.

maestro:database-migrations.description: Database migration best practices for schema changes, rollbacks, and zero-downtime deployments across PostgreSQL, MySQL, and ORMs. Use during maestro:implement when modifying database schemas.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply migration patterns during schema change tasks. Write reversible migrations, test rollbacks, and ensure zero-downtime compatibility.

maestro:django-patterns.description: Django architecture patterns, DRF APIs, ORM best practices, caching, and middleware. Use during maestro:implement when building Django features or REST APIs with Django REST Framework.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply Django patterns during Green phase. Use DRF serializers, viewsets, and ORM query optimization for implementation tasks.

maestro:django-tdd.description: Django TDD with pytest-django, factory_boy, and DRF testing. Use during maestro:implement when writing tests for Django models, views, and API endpoints.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply during Red phase (Step 6a.2) for Django test writing. Use factory_boy for fixtures, pytest-django for test runner, and DRF test client for API tests.

maestro:foundation-models-on-device.description: Apple FoundationModels framework for on-device LLM with guided generation and tool calling in iOS 26+. Use during maestro:implement when building on-device ML features for Apple platforms.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply FoundationModels patterns when implementing on-device LLM features. Use @Generable for structured output and snapshot streaming for UI.

maestro:frontend-patterns.description: React and Next.js frontend patterns for state management, performance optimization, and UI best practices. Use during maestro:implement when building UI components or client-side features.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply React patterns during component implementation. Use proper state management, memoization, and composition patterns.

maestro:golang-patterns.description: Idiomatic Go patterns, best practices, and conventions for robust Go applications. Use during maestro:implement when writing Go code -- error handling, concurrency, interfaces, and project structure.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply Go idioms during Green phase. Use error wrapping, context propagation, and interface-based design for clean Go implementations.

maestro:golang-testing.description: Go testing with table-driven tests, subtests, benchmarks, and fuzzing. Use during maestro:implement when writing Go tests following TDD methodology.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply during Red phase (Step 6a.2) for Go tests. Use table-driven tests, subtests for organization, and benchmarks for performance-critical code.

maestro:jpa-patterns.description: JPA/Hibernate patterns for entity design, relationships, query optimization, and transactions in Spring Boot. Use during maestro:implement when building JPA entities or optimizing database access.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply JPA patterns when implementing entity relationships, custom queries, and transaction management. Avoid N+1 queries with proper fetch strategies.

maestro:liquid-glass-design.description: iOS 26 Liquid Glass design system with dynamic glass materials, blur, reflection, and interactive morphing. Use during maestro:implement when building iOS 26 UI with the glass material system.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply Liquid Glass patterns when implementing iOS 26 UI. Use GlassEffectContainer, dynamic tinting, and morphing animations per Apple HIG.

maestro:nutrient-document-processing.description: Nutrient DWS API for document processing, conversion, OCR, redaction, signing, and form filling. Use during maestro:implement when building document processing features with Nutrient.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply Nutrient API patterns when implementing document workflows. Use appropriate endpoints for conversion, OCR, redaction, or signing tasks.

maestro:postgres-patterns.description: PostgreSQL query optimization, schema design, indexing, and security patterns. Use during maestro:implement when writing SQL queries or designing database schemas with PostgreSQL.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply PostgreSQL patterns during database implementation tasks. Use proper indexing, query optimization, and RLS policies.

maestro:python-patterns.description: Pythonic idioms, PEP 8 standards, type hints, and best practices for Python applications. Use during maestro:implement when writing Python code -- naming, structure, and idiomatic patterns.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply Pythonic patterns during Green phase. Use type hints, dataclasses, and PEP 8 conventions for clean Python implementations.

maestro:python-testing.description: Python testing with pytest, TDD methodology, fixtures, mocking, and parametrization. Use during maestro:implement when writing Python tests following TDD.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply during Red phase (Step 6a.2) for Python tests. Use pytest fixtures, parametrize for edge cases, and mock external dependencies.

maestro:springboot-patterns.description: Spring Boot architecture patterns, REST API design, layered services, and caching. Use during maestro:implement when building Java Spring Boot backend services.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply Spring Boot patterns during service implementation. Use layered architecture, proper exception handling, and Spring conventions.

maestro:springboot-tdd.description: Spring Boot TDD with JUnit 5, Mockito, MockMvc, and Testcontainers. Use during maestro:implement when writing tests for Spring services, controllers, and repositories.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply during Red phase (Step 6a.2) for Spring tests. Use MockMvc for controller tests, Mockito for service mocking, Testcontainers for integration tests.

maestro:swift-actor-persistence.description: Thread-safe data persistence using Swift actors with in-memory cache and file-backed storage. Use during maestro:implement when building persistence layers in Swift.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply actor-based persistence when implementing data storage. Use actors to eliminate data races by design with file-backed caching.

maestro:swift-concurrency-6-2.description: Swift 6.2 Approachable Concurrency with single-threaded default, @concurrent offloading, and isolated conformances. Use during maestro:implement when writing async Swift code.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply Swift 6.2 concurrency patterns during async implementation. Use default single-threaded execution, explicit @concurrent for background work.

maestro:swift-protocol-di-testing.description: Protocol-based dependency injection for testable Swift code with mock strategies and Swift Testing. Use during maestro:implement when writing testable Swift with DI.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply protocol-based DI during Red and Green phases. Define protocols for dependencies, inject via init, create mocks for testing.

maestro:swiftui-patterns.description: SwiftUI architecture with @Observable state management, view composition, navigation, and performance optimization. Use during maestro:implement when building SwiftUI views and features.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply SwiftUI patterns during UI implementation. Use @Observable for state, proper view composition, and navigation patterns.

maestro:tdd-workflow.description: Test-driven development workflow enforcing Red-Green-Refactor with 80%+ coverage. Use during maestro:implement as the core TDD methodology for all code changes.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply TDD cycle during Red-Green-Refactor (Steps 6a.2-6a.4). Write failing tests first, implement to pass, then refactor for quality.

maestro:coding-standards.description: TypeScript/JavaScript/React/Node.js coding standards and best practices. Use during maestro:implement for code quality and maestro:review for review criteria on TS/JS projects.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply coding standards during Green and Refactor phases. Enforce naming conventions, type safety, and React patterns.
maestro_phases.review: Use as review checklist for code quality dimensions -- naming, structure, type safety, and React best practices.

maestro:cpp-coding-standards.description: C++ coding standards based on C++ Core Guidelines for modern, safe, idiomatic C++. Use during maestro:implement for C++ code quality and maestro:review for C++ review criteria.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply C++ Core Guidelines during implementation. Enforce RAII, smart pointers, const correctness, and modern C++ idioms.
maestro_phases.review: Use as review checklist for C++ safety, resource management, and adherence to Core Guidelines.

maestro:java-coding-standards.description: Java coding standards for Spring Boot services covering naming, immutability, Optional, streams, and exceptions. Use during maestro:implement for Java code quality and maestro:review for Java review criteria.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply Java standards during Spring Boot implementation. Enforce immutability, proper Optional usage, and clean exception handling.
maestro_phases.review: Use as review checklist for Java naming, immutability, Optional patterns, and project layout.

maestro:cpp-testing.description: C++ testing with GoogleTest and CTest, coverage analysis, and sanitizers. Use during maestro:implement when writing C++ tests and maestro:review when checking C++ test coverage.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply during Red phase for C++ tests. Use GoogleTest assertions, TYPED_TEST for generic code, and CTest for integration.
maestro_phases.review: Verify test coverage with gcov/lcov. Check sanitizer configurations and test organization during review.

maestro:django-security.description: Django security best practices for authentication, CSRF, SQL injection, XSS prevention, and secure deployment. Use during maestro:review when reviewing Django security posture.

maestro_phases.review: Apply security checklist during review phase. Verify CSRF protection, SQL injection prevention, XSS defenses, and authentication configuration.

maestro:django-verification.description: Verification loop for Django: migrations, linting, tests with coverage, security scans, and deployment readiness. Use during maestro:review before Django releases or PRs.

maestro_phases.review: Run full verification loop: check migrations, run linter, execute tests with coverage, scan for security issues, verify deployment readiness.

maestro:e2e-testing.description: Playwright E2E testing with Page Object Model, CI/CD integration, and flaky test strategies. Use during maestro:implement for E2E test writing and maestro:review for coverage verification.

maestro_phases.implement: Write E2E tests for critical user flows using Playwright POM pattern. Integrate with CI pipelines.
maestro_phases.review: Verify E2E coverage of critical flows. Check for flaky tests and proper artifact management.

maestro:eval-harness.description: Formal evaluation framework for Claude Code sessions implementing eval-driven development (EDD). Use during maestro:review to measure and validate session outcomes with eval metrics.

maestro_phases.review: Apply eval harness to measure session outcomes. Define eval criteria, run evaluations, and track metrics against baselines.

maestro:security-review.description: Comprehensive security checklist for authentication, input handling, secrets, API endpoints, and sensitive data. Use during maestro:review for security posture assessment.

maestro_phases.review: Apply security checklist during review dimensions (Step 6). Check secrets management, input validation, authentication, and data protection.

maestro:security-scan.description: Scan Claude Code configuration (.claude/ directory) for security vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, and injection risks. Use during maestro:review to audit agent configuration security.

maestro_phases.review: Scan .claude/ directory for security issues. Check CLAUDE.md for injection risks, validate hooks, audit MCP server configs.

maestro:skill-stocktake.description: Audit Claude skills and commands for quality with Quick Scan or Full Stocktake modes. Use during maestro:review to assess skill quality and consistency.

maestro_phases.review: Run skill quality audit during review phase. Use Quick Scan for changed skills, Full Stocktake for comprehensive assessment.

maestro:springboot-security.description: Spring Security best practices for authentication, authorization, CSRF, secrets, and rate limiting. Use during maestro:review when reviewing Spring Boot security configuration.

maestro_phases.review: Apply Spring Security checklist during review. Verify authentication config, authorization rules, CSRF protection, and dependency security.

maestro:springboot-verification.description: Verification loop for Spring Boot: build, static analysis, tests with coverage, security scans, and diff review. Use during maestro:review before Spring Boot releases or PRs.

maestro_phases.review: Run full verification loop: build check, static analysis, test suite with coverage, security scan, and diff review.

maestro:verification-loop.description: Comprehensive post-change verification system with build, test, lint, and quality gates. Use during maestro:review as the core verification workflow before PRs or releases.

maestro_phases.review: Run verification loop as final review gate. Execute build verification, test suite, linting, and quality checks in sequence.

maestro:article-writing.description: Long-form content writing for articles, guides, blog posts, and tutorials with distinctive voice. Use in any maestro phase when producing written content longer than a paragraph.

maestro_phases.cross-cutting: Apply writing patterns in any phase when producing documentation, articles, or content deliverables. Maintain voice consistency and structure.

maestro:configure-ecc.description: Interactive installer for Everything Claude Code skills and rules. Use during maestro:setup or project initialization to install and configure ECC skills.

maestro_phases.cross-cutting: Use during project setup to install and configure relevant skills. Guides through skill selection and path configuration.

maestro:content-engine.description: Multi-platform content creation for X, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, and newsletters. Use in any maestro phase when producing social media content or marketing materials.

maestro_phases.cross-cutting: Apply content patterns when creating platform-native content. Adapt tone, format, and length per platform requirements.

maestro:continuous-learning.description: Auto-extract reusable patterns from Claude Code sessions as learned skills. Use across all maestro phases to capture and reuse session learnings.

maestro_phases.cross-cutting: Extract patterns after significant implementation or debugging sessions. Save as reusable skills for future reference.

maestro:continuous-learning-v2.description: Instinct-based learning system with hooks, confidence scoring, and skill evolution. Use across all maestro phases for project-scoped pattern learning via session observation.

maestro_phases.cross-cutting: Observe sessions via hooks, create atomic instincts with confidence scoring. Evolve instincts into skills/commands/agents over time.

maestro:deployment-patterns.description: Deployment workflows, CI/CD pipelines, Docker containerization, and rollback strategies. Use during maestro:implement for deployment setup and maestro:review for production readiness.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply deployment patterns when setting up CI/CD, containerization, or infrastructure-as-code.
maestro_phases.review: Use production readiness checklist during review. Verify health checks, rollback strategy, and environment configuration.

maestro:docker-patterns.description: Docker and Docker Compose patterns for local development, container security, and multi-service orchestration. Use during maestro:implement for containerization and maestro:review for container security.

maestro_phases.implement: Apply Docker patterns when containerizing applications. Use multi-stage builds, proper layer caching, and security-hardened base images.
maestro_phases.review: Review container security, volume strategies, networking configuration, and resource limits.

maestro:frontend-slides.description: Create animation-rich HTML presentations from scratch or convert PowerPoint files. Use in any maestro phase when building presentation slides or converting PPT/PPTX.

maestro_phases.cross-cutting: Apply slide creation patterns for presentations in any phase. Support both from-scratch and PPT conversion workflows.

maestro:investor-materials.description: Pitch decks, one-pagers, investor memos, financial models, and fundraising materials. Use in any maestro phase when producing investor-facing documents.

maestro_phases.cross-cutting: Apply fundraising document patterns when creating investor materials. Ensure consistency across pitch deck, memo, and financial model.

maestro:investor-outreach.description: Cold emails, warm intros, follow-ups, and investor communications for fundraising. Use in any maestro phase when drafting investor-facing outreach messages.

maestro_phases.cross-cutting: Apply investor communication patterns for outreach. Personalize per investor profile, maintain concise and credible tone.

maestro:plankton-code-quality.description: Write-time code quality enforcement via Plankton hooks for auto-formatting, linting, and Claude-powered fixes. Use across all maestro phases as a quality gate on file edits.

maestro_phases.cross-cutting: Enforce code quality on every file edit via hooks. Auto-format, lint, and apply Claude-powered fixes at write time.

maestro:project-guidelines-example.description: Example project-specific skill template based on a real production application. Use during maestro:setup as a reference for creating custom project skills.

maestro_phases.cross-cutting: Reference as a template when creating project-specific skills during setup. Shows structure and conventions for custom skills.

maestro:visa-doc-translate.description: Translate visa application documents (images) to English and create bilingual PDFs. Use in any maestro phase when translating documents for visa applications.

maestro_phases.cross-cutting: Apply document translation patterns when processing visa documents. Create bilingual PDF output with original and translation.
